2026-04-01T06:42:50.2778201Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2848857Z git version 2.53.0
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2881960Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/a91afb7b-db65-4335-9876-fd22c8fbb767/.gitconfig'
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2892273Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/a91afb7b-db65-4335-9876-fd22c8fbb767' before making global git config changes
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2893719Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2897804Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/bricks/bricks
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2929881Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2937341Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-01T06:42:50.2972225Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3202755Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3209826Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3249428Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3465108Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3472918Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-01T06:42:50.3506605Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
